svg.title: Chain-of-thought vs direct answering in LLMs
svg.desc: Side-by-side comparison. Left shows a direct answer path: prompt goes straight to output, skipping intermediate reasoning, and gets the wrong answer. Right shows chain-of-thought: the model externalises each reasoning step before reaching the final answer, arriving at the correct result.

g.text: for 2.5 hrs, how far does it go?"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do LLMs get reasoning wrong without chain of thought?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of reasoning mistakes do LLMs make?')
sendPrompt('How does chain-of-thought prompting work exactly?')
sendPrompt('Why does externalising reasoning steps improve accuracy?')
sendPrompt('How does the model use scratchpad tokens to compute?')
sendPrompt('What is the final answer format in chain-of-thought prompting?')
sendPrompt('How much does chain-of-thought improve accuracy on math problems?')
